name: rapid-ocr
description: Professional OCR tool for invoices and train tickets - depends on rapidocr-onnxruntime which downloads models on first use
author: OpenClaw

security.notes: Dependency (rapidocr-onnxruntime) downloads ~13MB models on first run. Skill code itself makes no network calls.

notes.dependency_behavior: Downloads OCR models from PaddleOCR on first invocation
